   Compiling clap v4.5.4
   Compiling regex v1.10.4
   Compiling anyhow v1.0.82
   Compiling toml v0.8.12
   Compiling my-app v0.1.0 (/home/user/my-app)

  --> src/main.rs:42:18
   |

   |            ---   ^^^^^^^ expected `u32`, found `&str`
   |            |
   |            expected due to this
